center.name: John Whitehead (explorer)
center.summary: John Whitehead (explorer)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mindoro scops owl，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Mindoro scops owl (Otus mindorensis) is an owl that is native to the Mindoro island in the Philippines

links.evidence: The Mindoro scops owl (Otus mindorensis) is an owl that is native to the Mindoro island in the Philippines
